positive: A stylized minimalist celestial landscape featuring overlapping mountain peaks and a glowing crescent moon. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical. Use an etched linocut style with strong, thick lines and deep contrast. Incorporate delicate geometric constellations and stylized stars connecting the peaks and moon. The aesthetic must be purely graphic, vector art, highly detailed, and designed for clear silhouettes. Single-color ink (black on white background), poster art, print-ready artwork.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, signature, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, poorly drawn, photorealistic, gradient, messy, color palette, depth of field
